summary: Two parallel Wave 3 tasks: (1) Add syncWithRegistry() to SkillRLManager that additively seeds all 29 skills from opencode-config/skills/registry.json on startup — preserving existing usage_count/success_rate for the 5 hardcoded seeds, adding 24 new entries with neutral defaults. (2) Wire logInvocation fire-and-forget into tool-execute-after hook for all MCP-prefixed tool calls (context7, distill, supermemory, websearch, grep, github, playwright). 4 new tests for syncWithRegistry covering idempotency, preservation, prefix normalization, and count.
notes: All 4 sync-registry tests pass. generalSkills.size = 29. Original 5 seeds preserve success_rate (0.85, 0.90, 0.95, 0.80, 0.88). Idempotent: calling syncWithRegistry twice keeps count at 29. local/oh-my-opencode/src is gitignored — tool-execute-after.ts change is tracked in external dev repo only.
